text: Moving from a sterile, functional space into a vibrant, creative zone stirs a shift within me. The first image’s glass and cleanliness evoke order and preparation—the world waiting to be arranged. The second surrounds me with color and text, ideas playing on the wall. I feel intrigued, as if I've stepped from pure possibility into dynamic innovation. There is excitement and a sense of purpose, as though these spaces—one neutral, one expressive—capture the dual journey of contemplation and creation.
